# ============================================================================
# Memory-CL — production lockfile
# ============================================================================
#
# This file pins every direct dependency to an exact version. The
# Dockerfile.production builder stage installs from this file so that
# two `docker build` invocations on the same git sha produce wheels
# that are bit-identical (modulo PyPI availability).
#
# DO NOT edit by hand without running:
#     pip install pip-tools==7.4.1
#     pip-compile --generate-hashes \
#         --output-file=requirements.lock.txt \
#         pyproject.toml
#
# Hash-pinned reproducibility is the next strict step; this lockfile
# is the bridge until pip-compile is wired into CI. The exact version
# pins below are sufficient to make the runtime image deterministic
# given a stable PyPI mirror.
# ============================================================================

# --- API surface -----------------------------------------------------------
fastapi==0.115.5
uvicorn[standard]==0.32.0
httpx==0.27.2

# --- Validation + settings -------------------------------------------------
pydantic==2.9.2
pydantic-settings==2.6.1

# --- Storage clients -------------------------------------------------------
sqlalchemy[asyncio]==2.0.36
asyncpg==0.30.0
qdrant-client==1.12.0
neo4j==5.27.0
redis==5.2.0

# --- Repo walking ----------------------------------------------------------
pathspec==0.12.1

# --- Observability ---------------------------------------------------------
structlog==24.4.0
opentelemetry-api==1.27.0
opentelemetry-sdk==1.27.0
opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi==0.48b0
opentelemetry-exporter-otlp==1.27.0

# --- Native MCP server (Phase-11) ------------------------------------------
# Official Model Context Protocol Python SDK. Provides the high-level
# Server, in-process client utilities, and the SSE + streamable-HTTP
# transport mountables used by apps/mcp/native_*.
mcp==1.10.1
sse-starlette==2.1.3
